display_name: MiMo V2 Omni is Xiaomi’s omni-modal foundation model that natively sees, hears, and understands text, images, audio, and video within a single unified architecture. It combines deep reasoning and web
description:
MiMo V2 Omni is Xiaomi’s omni-modal foundation model that natively sees, hears, and understands text, images, audio, and video within a single unified architecture. It combines deep reasoning and web search with agent-like capabilities—such as multi-step planning and tool use—to seamlessly power complex, real-world workflows.

Notes:
- Context Window: 256K
- Max Output: 128K
- Supported input modalities: Text, Image, Audio, Video

Parameter controls available:
1. Reasoning
- Deep Thinking (toggle, default: on): Step-by-step reasoning before answering.

2. Web Search
- Enable Web Search (toggle, default: off): Search the web for real-time information.
- Force Search (toggle, default: off): Always search, even if the model thinks it can answer directly. Only shown when Web Search is enabled.
- Max Keywords (slider, 1–5, default: 3): Maximum search keywords per round. Each keyword triggers a separate search call. More = broader but costlier. Only shown when Web Search is enabled.
- Results Limit (slider, 1–10, default: 5): Maximum web pages returned per search round. Only shown when Web Search is enabled.

3. Video Settings
- Video FPS (slider, 0.1-10, default: 2): Frames extracted per second from video. Higher = finer temporal detail but more tokens.
- Video Resolution (dropdown, default/max, default: default): Resolution tier for video frame analysis. 'Max' enhances recognition of small objects and fine details but uses more tokens.

Input Limits
- Images: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP (max 10 MB each). Multiple images supported.
- Audio: MP3, WAV, FLAC, M4A, OGG (max 100 MB each). Multiple files supported.
- Video: MP4, MOV, AVI, WMV (max 300 MB each). Multiple videos supported.
